sub_strands.sub_strand: Active Listening, Interpersonal Discussions, and Etiquette
outcomes: Listen attentively to multi-paragraph complex arguments to distinguish between fact and opinion
Contribute constructively to group discussions using turn-taking, appropriate vocabulary, and varied voice modulations

sub_strands.sub_strand: Fluency, Extensive Reading, and Information Retrieval
outcomes: Read grade-level prose fluently at a speed of 110–130 words per minute with appropriate expression
Analyze informational and literary texts to infer missing data and determine the writer's underlying purpose
Write cohesive informational and narrative compositions of up to three paragraphs using transitional devices
Apply accurate parts of speech including relative pronouns, adverbs of manner, and perfect tense configurations
Kusikiliza makala, hotuba, au midahalo na kubaini hoja kuu na upili kwa usahihi
Kujadili masuala mbalimbali kwa kutumia msamiati mwafaka na lugha yenye adabu na mtiririko mzuri

sub_strands.sub_strand: Kusoma kwa Kasi na Ufahamu wa Kina
outcomes: Kusoma vifungu vya habari na kazi za fasihi ili kuchanganua maana ya ndani na ujumbe wa mwandishi
Kufafanua methali, vitendawili, na misemo inayopatikana katika vifungu vya kusoma

sub_strands.sub_strand: Insha za Maelezo na Sarufi Teule
outcomes: Kuandika insha za maelezo, barua za kirafiki, na taarifa fupi zikizingatia kanuni zote za uandishi
Kutumia ngeli changamano, viunganishi vya wakati, na vinyume vya vitendo katika tungo
Read, write, model, and identify the place value of numbers up to 100,000
Find the Total Value of digits, and round off numbers up to 100,000 to the nearest ten thousand
Multiply a 3-digit number by a 2-digit number with and without regrouping patterns
Divide numbers up to 3 digits by 2-digit divisors with or without remainders
Perform combined mathematical operations (BODMAS) up to numbers totaling 100,000
Convert improper fractions into mixed numbers and vice versa through grouping models
Read, write, and add/subtract decimals up to two decimal places, and interpret percentages as hundredths
Calculate the perimeter of composite shapes, triangles, rectangles, and squares
Determine the area of rectangular and square surfaces using unit squares and formal algorithmic models
Measure the volume of cubes and cuboids using standard cubic units (cm³)
Solve multi-step money problems involving bills, changes, and basic budgeting calculations within 1,000 Shillings
Measure and draw angles using a protractor up to 180 degrees, and classify them accordingly
Collect environmental data points and represent them cleanly via standard column and bar charts
Identify, sketch, and outline the core functions of the organs in the human respiratory system
Examine how the human heart and blood vessels function during regular physical activities
Classify common fungi and bacteria based on their beneficial and harmful traits within local ecosystems
Demonstrate appropriate methods of handling food to avoid bacterial and fungal spoilage
Investigate how light travels in a straight line and verify properties of reflection using plain mirrors
Construct a functional periscope using local resources to observe hidden objects

sub_strands.sub_strand: Word Processing and Basic Block-Based Programming
outcomes: Create, edit, format, and safely save textual documents using standard word processing software tools
Construct elementary linear logic sequences using drag-and-drop block-based software environments

sub_strands.sub_strand: Small Wild Animals Management and Weed Control
outcomes: Construct and implement appropriate defensive barriers or scarecrows to protect farm crops from destructive small animals
Identify common farm weeds and demonstrate structural safe methods of mechanical and physical weeding

sub_strands.sub_strand: Preservation of Excess Farm Produce and Baking
outcomes: Practice solar drying, smoking, or traditional salting techniques to preserve perishable vegetables and pulses
Prepare simple balanced baked meals safely using local open-air or localized clay ovens

strands.strand: Physical Features and Climate of the Region

sub_strands.sub_strand: Physical Features, Map Reading, and Climate Zones
outcomes: Identify major rivers, mountains, and plains across the regional landscape and interpret map symbols accurately
Analyze the impact of distinct weather configurations and climate zones on local agricultural activities
Appreciate historical community leaders, physical cultural shrines, and artifacts that form the local identity
Outline the structure and fundamental roles of the local judicial systems and alternative dispute resolution pathways
Capture digital or simulated frames utilizing basic principles of composition, balance, and angles
Carve or model structural figurines representing active living postures using local soft stones, clay, or papier-mâché

sub_strands.sub_strand: Choral Performances, Playwriting, and Descant Recorder
outcomes: Perform dynamic folk songs and choral verses collaboratively while matching standard vocal ranges and key parameters
Play structured note configurations on the descant recorder using accurate fingerings and breath coordination rules

sub_strands.sub_strand: Talents, Stewardship, and Ethical Media Behavior
outcomes: Evaluate individual talents and stewardship responsibilities based on sacred writings and ancient scriptures
Apply spiritual moral benchmarks to identify and avoid cyber-bullying, plagiarism, and misinformation on digital channels
